CustomField.description: Monthly Threshold Amount: This represents the minimum monthly charge in the Maintenance Reserve rate currency. Choose to enter either this amount or the Threshold Units and Rate. Note that the field allows precision up to six decimal places. However, the Threshold Amount field, which has a precision of two decimal places, always supersedes this precise field (keep it blank if you need more precision).
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Monthly Threshold Amount: This represents the minimum monthly charge in the Maintenance Reserve rate currency. Choose to enter either this amount or the Threshold Units and Rate. Note that the field allows precision up to six decimal places. However, the Threshold Amount field, which has a precision of two decimal places, always supersedes this precise field (keep it blank if you need more precision)
CustomField.label: Threshold Amount (Precise)
